# MoreFlyout

Provide OSD display that completely restores Win11 FluentUI style. Maybe this application looks like [MordenFlyouts](https://github.com/ModernFlyouts-Community/ModernFlyouts).

## Overview

- Now add flyouts for Lock keys(Capital lock, number lock)
- Flyout of the media
- Linkage with [Auto Dark Mode](https://github.com/AutoDarkMode/Windows-Auto-Night-Mode)! Flyout when your light mode and dark mode change

## Download

You can download application from [Github Release](https://github.com/ChenYiLins/MoreFlyout/releases) Page. Later will provide a install program named `MoreFlyout-x64-x.x.x.exe` and a portable compressed package named `MoreFlyout-Portable-x64-x.x.x.zip`.

System Requirements:

- Windows10 build 1809 and above
- x86 bit system
